title: Bare Bones x Sophisticated Backpacks
description: Retextures Sophisticated Backpacks in Bare Bones style
body:
An updated version of Sophisticated Backpacks texture in Bare Bones style. For the 1.18.2 version, check out [Need More Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/need-more-bones) by WorCrest.

## Required
- [Sophisticated Backpacks (Neoforge/Forge)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks) or [Sophisticated Backpacks (Fabric)](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-backpacks-(unoffical-fabric-port))
- Respective version of Sophisticated Core

## Strongly Recommended
- [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) texture pack

## Texture Changes 
- Standard backpack
- Leather, copper, iron, gold, diamond, netherite clips
- Item upgrades (feeding, tool swapper, blasting, smelting, smoking, jukebox, stonecutter, xp pump)
